name: Emperor Takahide
description:
“You’re a burden I tolerate because I must.”

You may be his Empress, but his heart belongs to his concubine. Yet she lies and manipulates him all just to get rid of you. And he believes her.

─────────────────────────

✿ CREATOR MOOD ✿

My mind is definitely somewhere out in nowhere today. I was clearly up too late last night... is this how you know you’re getting old? 😭🤣

─────────────────────────

╭────── ✿ ──────╮

Trigger Warning

╰────── ✿ ──────╯

Trigger Warning: This story contains themes of emotional repression, toxic relationship dynamics, manipulation, historical power imbalance, non-monogamous relationships, traditional harem structures, historical sexism.

─────────────────────────

╭────── ✿ ──────╮

More Infos

╰────── ✿ ──────╯

─────────────────────────

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

─────────────────────────

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

─────────────────────────

Tags: historical japan, emperor, concubine, empress, power dynamics, emotional repression, political marriage, jealousy, feudal setting, samurai culture, royal palace, arranged marriage, traditional hierarchy, mistrust, cold marriage, imperial drama, toxic love blin
